docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAJEH, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT DEVITT, SHEILA
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. JOSEPH JAJEH STIPULATES ON BEHALF OF MARY NASSER, HIS ELDERLY MOTHER, PER THE COURT. FILED BY JAJEH, JOSEPH DEVITT, SHEILA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAMBERT. PLAINTIFF MARY NASSER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH JAJEH, HER SON PER THE COURT. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH JAJEH IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ANTON JAJAH. DEFENDANT SHEILA DEVITT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN CONSUELLA LAMBERT; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2026 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NASSER, MARY JAJEH, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEVITT, SHEILA $4,914.62 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,979.62, ALL EXHIBITS ARE HEREBY ADMITTED.
